hero.title: Paint your photo
hero.description: We print your AI-enhanced images on professional canvas with a beautiful beveled edge. Real looking paintings crafted with museum-quality materials for lasting beauty.

upload.title: Upload photo
upload.description: Upload your favorite photo to get started

adjust.title: Adjust photo
adjust.description: Fine-tune your image with AI enhancement

order.title: Place an order
order.description: Select your canvas size and place your order

result.title: Get your painting
result.description: Receive your museum-quality painting at your door

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Learn more about Tuus Imago and our mission

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: At Tuus Imago, we believe that every photo tells a unique story. Our mission is to help you preserve and enhance your most precious memories through cutting-edge AI technology and premium canvas printing services.

story.title: Our Story
story.description: Founded in 2024, Tuus Imago was born from a passion for photography and a vision to make professional photo enhancement accessible to everyone. We combine years of experience in digital imaging with state-of-the-art artificial intelligence to deliver stunning results.

aiEnhancement.label: AI Enhancement:
aiEnhancement.description: We use advanced artificial intelligence to automatically enhance your photos, improving colors, sharpness, and overall quality.

canvasPrinting.label: Canvas Printing:
canvasPrinting.description: Your enhanced photos are printed on premium canvas using archival-quality inks that ensure vibrant colors for generations to come.

customFraming.label: Custom Framing:
customFraming.description: Choose from a variety of frame options to perfectly complement your artwork and home décor.

qualityFirst.label: Quality First:
qualityFirst.description: We never compromise on quality, from the enhancement algorithms to the printing process and final delivery.

customerSatisfaction.label: Customer Satisfaction:
customerSatisfaction.description: Your happiness is our priority. We work tirelessly to ensure you love every photo you receive.

innovation.label: Innovation:
innovation.description: We continuously invest in the latest AI and imaging technologies to bring you the best results possible.

sustainability.label: Sustainability:
sustainability.description: We are committed to environmentally responsible practices, from eco-friendly inks to sustainable packaging materials.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.description: Have questions or want to learn more? We'd love to hear from you!

legal.title: Legal Information
legal.subtitle: Privacy Policy and Terms of Service

privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicy.description: At Tuus Imago, we take your privacy seriously. All uploaded photos are processed securely and are used solely for the purpose of AI enhancement and canvas printing services.

dataCollection.label: Data Collection:
dataCollection.description: We only collect the photos you upload and any necessary contact information for service delivery.

dataStorage.label: Data Storage:
dataStorage.description: Your photos are stored securely on encrypted cloud servers.

dataUsage.label: Data Usage:
dataUsage.description: Photos are used exclusively for processing and delivering your orders. We never share your images with third parties without explicit consent.

dataRetention.label: Data Retention:
dataRetention.description: Your data is retained only as long as necessary to complete your order and provide customer support.

termsOfService.title: Terms of Service
termsOfService.description: By using our services, you agree to the following terms and conditions.

serviceUse.label: Service Use:
serviceUse.description: You agree to use our AI enhancement and printing services only for lawful purposes and in accordance with these Terms.

contentOwnership.label: Content Ownership:
contentOwnership.description: You retain full ownership of all photos you upload. Tuus Imago obtains a limited license to process and deliver your photos.

refundPolicy.label: Refund Policy:
refundPolicy.description: Refunds are available within 30 days of delivery if the product quality does not meet our standards.

limitationOfLiability.label: Limitation of Liability:
limitationOfLiability.description: We are not liable for any damages arising from the use of our services beyond the purchase price of your order.

contact.title: Contact & Support
contact.description: For any questions regarding our privacy policy or terms of service, please contact us:

upload.clickToUpload: Click to upload or drag and drop your image here
upload.fileSupport: Supports JPG, PNG, and WebP files up to 10MB
upload.aiAdjustmentsHint: Select one or more AI effects and switch between original and AI preview.
upload.cropHint: Drag and resize the selection area to choose the final painting frame.
upload.aiPreviewError: AI preview could not be rendered. Check selected effects and try again.

uploader.dragCropArea: Drag the crop area to select the region to keep
uploader.removeBackgroundDescription: Automatically removes the background, leaving only the main subject.
uploader.enhanceDescription: Improves sharpness, color, and overall image quality.
uploader.emptyCenterSlotPlaceholder: This slot is empty. Pick a side slot to continue.
uploader.uploadSelectedSlotsConfirmDescription: All filled slots will be uploaded with the current brightness and contrast settings.
uploader.splitSlotsConfirmDescription: This action will split your image into three vertical sections and replace all current slots. This cannot be undone.
uploader.resetSlotsConfirmDescription: This action removes all currently selected images from the uploader and cannot be undone.
uploader.maxImagesError: You can select up to 3 images

checkout.backToUploadDialogDescription: Any information you entered will be lost.
checkout.subtitle: Complete your order details
checkout.orderSuccessMessage: Your order has been placed successfully. You will receive a confirmation e-mail shortly.
checkout.orderSelectionHint: Select which slots should be included in checkout.
checkout.termsAccepted: I accept the terms and conditions *
checkout.termsAcceptedError: You must accept the terms and conditions
checkout.privacyAcceptedError: You must accept the privacy policy
checkout.marketingConsent: I consent to receive marketing information (optional)
checkout.requiredFields: * Required fields. Your information will be used for shipping purposes only.
checkout.errorEmail: Please enter a valid email address
checkout.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

consents.title: Legal Consents
consents.termsSuffix: and consent to the processing of personal data.
consents.privacyLabel: I consent to the processing of my personal data for order fulfillment.
consents.marketingLabel: I consent to receiving marketing information (optional)
consents.termsAcceptedError: You must accept the terms and conditions
consents.privacyAcceptedError: You must consent to the processing of personal data

businessHours.title: Business Hours
businessHours.description: Our team is available Monday through Friday, 9:00 AM to 5:00 PM CET.

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.subtitle: How we use cookies on our website

main.title: Cookie Policy Overview
main.description: This page contains information about how we use cookies and similar technologies on our website. Detailed content will be added soon.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: How we protect your personal data

main.title: Privacy Policy Overview
main.description: This Privacy Policy describes how we collect, use, and protect your personal data in accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and Polish data protection laws. We are committed to ensuring the security and privacy of your personal information.

dataController.title: Data Controller
dataController.description: The data controller responsible for processing your personal data is:
dataController.name: Company Name

typesOfData.title: Types of Personal Data We Collect
typesOfData.description: We collect the following types of personal data:
typesOfData.item2: Contact data (email address, phone number, delivery address)
typesOfData.item3: Financial data (payment information, bank account details for refunds)
typesOfData.item5: Technical data (IP address, browser type, device information)

legalBasis.title: Legal Basis for Processing
legalBasis.description: We process your personal data based on the following legal grounds under Article 6 of the GDPR:
legalBasis.article1Text: Processing necessary for the performance of a contract to which you are a party, such as processing your order and delivery.
legalBasis.article2Text: Processing necessary for compliance with a legal obligation to which we are subject, such as tax and accounting requirements.
legalBasis.article3Text: Processing necessary for our legitimate interests, such as improving our services and customer experience.

dataPurposes.title: Purposes of Data Processing
dataPurposes.description: We use your personal data for the following purposes:
dataPurposes.item2: Delivery of goods to your specified address

dataSharing.title: Sharing Your Data
dataSharing.description: We may share your personal data with the following third parties:
dataSharing.partner3: Hosting providers - Data storage and infrastructure
dataSharing.partner4: Accounting services - Financial reporting and tax compliance
dataSharing.noSale: We do not sell your personal data to third parties.

dataStorage.title: Data Retention Period
dataStorage.description: We store your personal data only for the period necessary for the purposes for which it was collected:

userRights.title: Your Rights Under GDPR
userRights.description: Under the General Data Protection Regulation, you have the following rights:
userRights.right1Desc: You can request a copy of your personal data and information about how we process it.
userRights.right2Desc: You can request correction of inaccurate or incomplete personal data.
userRights.right3Desc: You can request deletion of your personal data when there is no legal basis for its processing.
userRights.right4Desc: You can request restriction of processing in certain circumstances.
userRights.right5Desc: You can request your data in a structured, commonly used, machine-readable format.
userRights.right6Desc: You can object to processing based on legitimate interest, including profiling.
userRights.exercise: To exercise any of these rights, please contact us at info@tuusimago.com

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.description: Our website uses cookies to ensure proper functioning and improve user experience.
cookies.necessaryDesc: Essential for the website to function properly. These cookies enable basic features like page navigation and access to secure areas.
cookies.analyticsDesc: Help us understand how visitors interact with our website by collecting anonymous information about page visits and traffic sources.
cookies.marketingDesc: Used to track visitors across websites to display relevant advertisements. These cookies are only set with your consent.
cookies.manage: You can manage cookie preferences through your browser settings.

dataSecurity.title: Data Security
dataSecurity.description: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal data:
dataSecurity.item1: SSL/TLS encryption for data in transit

children.title: Protection of Minors
children.description: Our services are not intended for children under 16 years of age. We do not knowingly collect personal data from minors without parental consent.

changes.title: Changes to Privacy Policy
changes.description: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Any changes will be posted on this page with an updated revision date. We encourage you to review this policy periodically.

contact.title: Contact Information
contact.description: For any questions about this Privacy Policy or to exercise your data protection rights, please contact us:
contact.responseTime: We will respond to your request within 30 days.
contact.dpo: For matters related to data protection, you can also contact us at:

complaints.title: Right to Lodge a Complaint
complaints.description: If you believe your data protection rights have been violated, you have the right to lodge a complaint with the Polish Data Protection Office (UODO).

main.title: Returns and Complaints Policy
main.description: Below you will find detailed information about our return procedures, complaint process, and your consumer rights.

rightOfWithdrawal.title: Right of Withdrawal
rightOfWithdrawal.period: You have the right to withdraw from the contract within 14 days from the day you received the goods without giving any reason.
rightOfWithdrawal.howTo: How to withdraw from the contract:
rightOfWithdrawal.step1: Complete the withdrawal form (available on our website or request it by email)
rightOfWithdrawal.step2: Send the goods to the address: ul. Wybickiego 48, 32-400 Myślenice
rightOfWithdrawal.step3: Send us the completed form by email to: returns@tuusimago.com
rightOfWithdrawal.deadline: The deadline is met if you send the goods before the 14 days have passed.

returnCosts.title: Return Costs
returnCosts.whoPays: In case of withdrawal from the contract, you bear the direct costs of returning the goods.
returnCosts.condition: The goods must be returned in their original condition and packaging.

refund.title: Refund
refund.timeline: The refund will be processed within 14 days from the day we receive the returned goods or proof of their dispatch.
refund.method: The refund will be made using the same payment method that was used for the purchase.
refund.delay: We may withhold the refund until we receive the goods or until you provide proof of their dispatch.

condition.title: Condition of Goods
condition.description: You are responsible for any diminution in the value of the goods resulting from handling them beyond what is necessary to determine their nature, characteristics, and functioning.

damaged.title: Complaint for Damaged or Defective Goods
damaged.description: If the goods you received are damaged or defective, you have the right to file a complaint.
damaged.step1: Contact us by email at: returns@tuusimago.com
damaged.step2: Describe the problem and attach photos of the damage
damaged.step3: We will process your complaint within 14 days
damaged.step4: If the complaint is approved, we will replace the goods or refund your money
damaged.freeReturn: In case of a complaint, we cover the return shipping costs.

complaintForm.title: Complaint Form
complaintForm.description: You can use our complaint form available on the website:

nonReturnable.title: Exclusions
nonReturnable.description: The right of withdrawal does not apply to:
nonReturnable.item1: Goods made to individual order (e.g., personalized products)
nonReturnable.item2: Perishable goods or goods with short shelf life
nonReturnable.item3: Goods delivered in sealed packaging that cannot be returned for health or hygiene reasons

legalBasis.title: Legal Basis
legalBasis.description: The returns and complaints policy is based on the Consumer Rights Act of May 30, 2014.

main.title: Security Overview
main.description: This page contains information about the security measures we take to protect your information. Detailed content will be added soon.

shipping.title: Shipping Information
shipping.subtitle: How we deliver your orders

main.title: Delivery Terms
main.description: Below you will find detailed information about our delivery methods, costs, processing times, and procedures for handling undelivered shipments.

timeframe.title: Processing Time
timeframe.businessDays: Delivery time is 2-4 business days from the moment the order is dispatched
timeframe.note: Time is calculated from the day the shipment is handed over to the courier.

tracking.title: Shipment Tracking
tracking.description: After your order is dispatched, you will receive an email with the tracking number and a link to monitor the shipment status.

failedDelivery.title: Procedure for Undelivered Shipments
failedDelivery.description: If the shipment cannot be delivered due to the recipient's absence or incorrect address, the courier will leave a notification about the delivery attempt. The shipment will be transferred to the nearest pickup point where it will be held for 7 days.
failedDelivery.procedure: Pickup procedure: please visit the indicated pickup point with a valid ID. If someone else is collecting on your behalf, a power of attorney is required.

shipping.noInternational: We do not currently offer international shipping. Delivery is currently available only within Poland.

terms.title: Terms and Conditions
terms.subtitle: Terms of use for our services

main.title: Terms and Conditions Overview
main.description: This page contains the terms and conditions for using our services. Detailed content will be added soon.

payments.title: Payments
payments.subtitle: Information about payment methods and security

blik.label: BLIK
blik.description: Fast and secure mobile payment method. Use your banking app to complete the payment in seconds.
blik.step1: Select BLIK as your payment method
blik.step2: Enter the 6-digit BLIK code in your banking app
blik.step3: Confirm the payment in your banking app

transfer.label: Traditional Bank Transfer
transfer.description: Standard bank transfer available in most Polish banks. Payment will be processed after funds are credited.
transfer.step1: Select your bank from the list
transfer.step2: Log in to online banking and confirm the payment

cards.label: Payment Cards
cards.description: We accept Visa, Mastercard, Maestro and other cards. Payments are processed securely through Przelewy24.

installments.label: Installments
installments.description: Pay in installments using PayPo or Alior Raty. Available for orders above 200 PLN.

timeframe.label: Processing Time
timeframe.description: BLIK payments are processed instantly. Traditional transfers are credited within 1-2 business days.

confirmation.label: Order Confirmation
confirmation.description: After payment is credited, you will receive an email with order confirmation and order number.

ssl.label: SSL Encryption
ssl.description: All transactions are protected by SSL/TLS encryption, ensuring the security of your data.

pci.label: PCI DSS Compliance
pci.description: Our payment processor Przelewy24 is PCI DSS compliant, providing the highest level of card transaction security.

dataProtection.label: Data Protection
dataProtection.description: We do not store your card payment data. All transactions are processed through Przelewy24.

process.label: Refund Process
process.description: Refunds are processed through Przelewy24 and returned to the same payment method used for purchase.

timeframe.label: Refund Processing Time
timeframe.description: Refunds are processed within 14 business days from complaint approval.

method.label: Refund Method
method.description: Funds will be returned to the bank account or card used for payment. Credit time depends on your bank.

reasons.label: Reasons for Failed Payment
reasons.description: Payment may be rejected due to insufficient funds, incorrect card data, limit exceeded, or internet connection issues.

action.label: What to Do?
action.description: Check your data and balance, then try again. If the problem persists, contact us or your bank.

p24.title: About Przelewy24
p24.description: Payments are processed by Przelewy24 - the leader of the Polish online payment market. Click below to read Przelewy24 terms and privacy policy.

complaint.title: Complaint Form
complaint.subtitle: Submit a complaint regarding your order

deadline.label: Complaint Submission Deadline
deadline.description: Complaints can be submitted within 14 days of receiving the product according to Polish consumer law.

responseTime.label: Response Time
responseTime.description: We will respond to your complaint within 14 business days from the date of receipt.

requiredDocs.label: Required Documents
requiredDocs.description: To process the complaint, the following are required: order number, product photo, problem description, and proof of purchase.

resolution.label: Expected Resolution
resolution.placeholder: How would you like us to resolve this?

photos.title: Product Photos
photos.description: Attach clear photos showing the damage or defect. Maximum 5 photos, up to 5 MB each.

consent.label: I agree to the processing of my personal data for complaint processing in accordance with the Privacy Policy. *

contact.title: Complaint Contact
contact.description: You can also contact us by phone or email regarding complaints.

hours.title: Complaint Service Hours
hours.description: Complaint service is available Monday to Friday, 9:00 AM - 5:00 PM CET.
